creator: cpiazza@home.net
text:
Arrgh!
Missing patches/patch-ae, see below.
 
Would someone please enlighten me on this:

Using 'cvs diff', is there any way to get the same action as diff -N?
cvs diff -uN does not include the new files, but diff -ruN does.

patches/patch-ae:

--- blackbox/patches/patch-ae   Wed Dec 31 16:00:00 1969
+++ blackbox.new/patches/patch-ae       Sun Mar 21 18:23:33 1999
@@ -0,0 +1,10 @@
+--- src/Screen.cc.old  Sun Mar 21 18:18:59 1999
++++ src/Screen.cc      Sun Mar 21 18:19:06 1999
+@@ -311,7 +311,6 @@
+   }   
+       
+ #ifdef    KDE
+-    unsigned long data = (unsigned long) workspacesList->count();
+
+     XChangeProperty(display, root_window,
+                   blackbox->getKWMNumberOfDesktopsAtom(),


---
Chris Piazza   Abbotsford, BC, Canada
cpiazza@home.net
finger norn@norn.ca.eu.org for PGP key
